headline: Energy Roundtable: 11 Stocks to Play the Biggest Energy Supply Shock Ever
summary: Oil and gas production won’t rebound quickly even if the Iran war ends soon. Why Devon Energy, Baker Hughes, and other stocks can weather the storm.

headline: Champlain Sells Out of Freshpet Position, Dumps $125 Million in Stock
summary: This pet food company delivers fresh, natural meals for dogs and cats through retail and online channels across North America and Europe.
